titleStmt.title: SII 23.126: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 126. (A.R. No. 126 of 1907.) Pāppāṉkuḷam, Ambasamudram Taluk, Tirunelveli District Siddhajñānēśvara temple—on the north wall of the same kitchen Māṟ. Kulaśēkhara I: year 8: A.D. 1276

summary.p: This is also dated in the 8th year of king Māṟavarman Kulaśēkharadēva who ‘was pleased to take every country’. The details of date are given as Tulā, śu. 9, Wednesday, Śravaṇa which, are however, found irregular for this year.

It registers the sale of a tax-free garden land called Maṇaltōṭṭam and another plot at Tiruppaḍimaṅgalam a hamlet in their village Kaṟkuṟichchi alias Vikramapāṇḍyanallūr by the Ūravar to the same temple for the formation and maintenance of a flower garden, for 60 guḷikaippaṇam. This is evidently the land referred to in the previous inscription as having been sold in Aippaśi month.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . komāṟapaṉmarāṉa tribhuvaṉaccakravattika ḷemmaṇṭalamuṅ koṇṭaruḷiya śrī kulacekaratevaṟku yāṇṭu 8vatu tulānāyaṟṟu pūrvakhakṣattu navamiyum budhaṉkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa
tiruvoṇattunāḷ muḷḷināṭṭuc ceraṉaiveṉṟāṉtirumaṭaiviḷākattu nāyaṉār karuttaṟintumuṭitta pāṇṭiśvaramuṭaiya nāyaṉār koyilil Ādicaṇḍeśvaradevaṟku Innāṭṭuk kaṟkuṟicci
yāṉa vikramapāṇṭiyanallūr Ūṟkuc camaitta Ūravarom vilai pramāṇam paṇṇikkuṭutta bhumiyāvatu Eṅkaḷūṟ paṟṟu tiruppaṭimaṅka lattu paṟṟil maṇaltoṭṭattukkup perunāṉkel
laiyāvatu kiḻellai Ittoṭṭattil kiḻai yaraimāvil meltalaiyil teṉppāṟṟu cevvaikku meṟkum teṉṉellai kamalaipāṟṟukku vaṭakkum melellai veḷārkuṟicciyil nāya
ṉār pakavativiṇṇakaremperumāṉ tiruviṭaiyāṭṭam maṇaltoṭṭat til kiḻellaiyil tiruvāḻikkallukkaḷ peṟṟa cevvaikkuk kiḻakkum vaṭavellai tiruppaṭimaṅkalattuc celkāl vayalukkut te
ṟkum Āka Innāṉkellaikkuṭpaṭṭa toṭṭamum Itaṉ vaṭakku Ip paṟṟile vanta tiruvitiyāka vayaṟkūṟṟil nilaṅkalantavāṟṟāl teṉ vaṭalāka vintaṉūṟ pilāṟṟile Eṟaviṭṭa śa Innilam Araiy
kāṇiyum Innāṉkellaikkuṭpaṭṭa toṭṭamum Innilaṅkaḷil meṉok kiṉa maramuṅ kiṇokkiṉa kiṇaṟum maṟṟu meppeṟpaṭṭa samastaprāpti kaḷum nāṅkaḷuṭaiya paṭiyile caṇṭeśvaravilaiyāka vi
ṟṟu vilaipramāṇam paṇṇikkuṭuttom nāyaṉār karuttaṟintu muṭitta pāṇṭiśvaramuṭaiya nāyaṉār koyilil Āticaṇṭeśvaradevaṟkku kaṟ kuṟicciyāṉa vikramapāṇṭiyanallūr Ūṟkuccamainta
Ūravarom Ippaṭi caṇṭeśvaravilaiyāka viṟṟukkuṭutta Innāṉkellaik kuṭpaṭṭa toṭṭattukkum Ivviḷainilam Araikkāṇikkum Innilaṅ kaḷil Eppeṟpaṭṭa samastaprāptikaḷum Emmilicaintu
vilai niścayitta taṉapāla kuḷikai 6 10 Ippaṇam Aṟupatum Innāyaṉār koyilil taṉmakattāvāṉa nāyaṉār kāṅkeyar kāriyap periyapiḷḷai Attāṇiśvaramuṭaiyārpakkal paṟṟi Ittiruppaṭimaṅkala muḷḷiṭṭa paṟṟu
Eṅkaḷ kaiyāl muṉṉoṟṟiyuṭaiya piḷḷai vikramapāṇṭiyac coḻak koṉāṟku Innila viḻukkāṭṭukku Ivar piṭipāṭṭiṉpaṭi kāl caṅ kai yeṟiṉāl kuṭukka Ikkoyil civappirāmaṇaṉ cokkappaṭṭaṉ svam nikkiṉa ṭṭa 2 10
m Eṅkaḷ kaiyyil paṟṟiṉa ṭṭa 2 10 Ippaṇa maṟupatum Ivvakaippaṭiyi yile koṇṭuṅ kuṭuppittum poruṭcilavākac cātti viṟṟu vilaipramāṇam paṇṇikkuṭuttom Ādicaṇḍeśvaradevaṟku Ūṟku
ccamainta Ūravarom Ippaṭi viṟṟukkuṭutta Innilaṅkaḷukkum Itil Eppeṟpaṭṭa samastaprāptikaḷukkum Ituve vilaiyolaiyum poruṭ cilavolaiyu māvutākavu mituvallatu veṟu vilaimāvaṟutipporu
ṭ celavolai kāṭṭavuṅ kāṇavuṅ kaṭavataṉṟi vilaikkaṟa viṟṟu poru ḷaṟak koṇṭu viṟṟu vilaipramāṇam paṇṇikkuṭutta Innilaṅkaḷukku nāṉkellaiyilum tiruccūlattāpaṉam paṇṇikkoḷvarākavum
Innilaṅkaḷ tāmveṇṭum payirkaḷ ceytuñ ceyvittuṅ koṇṭaṉu pavippārākavum Aṉupavikkumiṭattu Innilaṅkaḷukku Eppeṟpaṭṭa Iṟaikaḷum Innāyiṉāṟku tirunantavaṉappuṟa Iṟaiyiliyāka Eṅkaḷū
ril Oḻukiluṅ kaḻittuk kuṭuttom Ippaṭikku ccandrātadityavaṟ cellak kalliluñ cempilum veṭṭikkoḷvarākavum Ippaṭi cammatittu vilaipramāṇam paṇṇikkuṭuttom nāyaṉār karuttaṟintu muṭitta
pāṇṭiśvaramuṭaiya nāyaṉār koyil Āticaṇḍeśvaradevaṟku kaṟkuṟicci yāṉa vikramapāṇṭiyanallūr Ūṟku camainta Ūravarom Ivai vikkiramciṅkatevaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai naraciṅkapanmaṉeḻuttu Ivai kacciya
rāyaṉeḻuttu Ivai Uttamaciṅkatevaṉeḻuttu Ivai yirācaciṅkateva ṉeḻuttu kumara nārāyaṇatevar taṟkuṟikkum teṉṉaraṅka tevaṉ taṟ kuṟikkum taṟkuṟimāṭṭeṟinteṉ Ivai naraciṅkapaṉmaṉeḻuttu Ivai kūttāṭunteva ṉe
ḻuttu civallapap pallavaraiyaṉ taṟkuṟikku kūttāṭuntevaṉeḻuttu Ivar kaḷ colla Ipramāṇa meḻutiṉeṉ Ivai tantirakkaṇakku periya tevaṉeḻuttu Ikkal veṭṭiṉeṉ Ivvūṟciṟppācāriyaṉ tampikku nallā
ṉāṉa vikramapāṇṭiya Āccāriyaṉeṉ svasti
Digital edition of SII 23.126 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
